name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
AI Enabled Technology Hands-On Leader looking for work

My Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules combine into a Specification Driven Framework

Your ai agent developed programs seamlessly work together and show in a unified command center.
Existing projects conformed with minimal impact.

Full Specification Driven workflow from having your AI agent write specifications through the iterative build and support process. Your programs look the same and behave the same and you have full observability and control.

  • Control Panel - Unified project view (namespaced) plus project control
  • Service Catalog - Project seamless Interoperability (Rest, CLI, Async, MCP)
  • Opinionated Stack - Consistent Builds, Context Optimized
  • Formal Workflow - Process based change control, Light-weight kanban
  • Seamless Operations - Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, and Data Flows
  • Quality Focused - Scorecards, Validators, and Process
  • Voice Control of your program fleet (future)
  • Ollama because ... money (future) - configurable models

Hands On Leader at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
